name: Five O Fore Golf + Entertainment
about: Five O Fore Golf + Entertainment is a multi-level golf entertainment venue in New Orleans featuring 78 bays equipped with Trackman technology for immersive golf simulations and games. The venue offers a comprehensive experience combining high-tech golf with dining options, including a full-service restaurant serving Creole and Cajun-inspired cuisine, and multiple bars, including a dedicated Bourbon Lounge. With a Las Vegas-style light show and space for large groups and private events, it caters to both serious golfers and casual visitors seeking a fun, social atmosphere.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman™ technology for precise analytics and immersive gameplay
78 spacious bays with a variety of games and simulations for all skill levels
On-site dining and bar options, including the Bourbon Lounge with local flavors
Virtual coaching available for personalized swing analysis and performance improvement
Las Vegas-style light show enhances the overall entertainment experience

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service restaurant with Creole and Cajun-inspired cuisine, including Boudin Balls, Cajun Crawfish Pies, and Clubhouse Nachos.
Multiple bars on each floor, including the Bourbon Lounge with specialty cocktails like Sazeracs and local beers.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitors with precise ball and club tracking analytics.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, clubs are typically provided for use in the bays, though personal clubs are welcome.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food or drink?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink are not permitted. The venue offers a full-service restaurant and bar options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically take 60-90 minutes depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Five O Fore offers birthday party packages and a family-friendly atmosphere with games suitable for all ages.
